message:
fix: use getBeadsWorktreePath in pushSyncBranch for worktree compatibility

pushSyncBranch hardcoded filepath.Join(repoRoot, ".git", "beads-worktrees", ...)
which fails when run from a git worktree where .git is a file, not a directory.
Now uses getBeadsWorktreePath() which resolves via git rev-parse --git-common-dir.

Fixes bd-n3v

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
